StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT 100.00 * SUM(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS promo_revenue FROM tpch_sf1.lineitem INNER JOIN tpch_sf1.part ON l_partkey = p_partkey WHERE l_shipdate >= '1996-02-01' AND l_shipdate < '1996-03-01'

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [globalagg1011]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1013] END
CASE WHEN [globalagg1015]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1017] END
SUM(CASE WHEN [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[part].[p_type] like 'PROMO%' THEN [dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_extendedprice]*((1.)-[dbprove].[tpch_sf1].[lineitem].[l_discount]) ELSE (0.0000) END)
